violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026

Ice bucket in kitchen was not stored inverted. Water observed in plastic food containers on the clean storage rack. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The oven electrical cord plugged into the outlet behind the fryers was not in good repair, partially melted, and a paper service tag attached to the cord is 75% burned away. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of food containers have an accumulation of adhesive. The plasticware bins have an accumulation of food residue and debris. The ice cream chest freezer has an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
The wall behind the fryers is in poor repair, burned and fraying. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026
The fan covers in the meat walk in have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked eggs) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Egg & Chorizo sandwich, and potatoes observed held at 107-126 degrees Fahrenheit in the cafe. Pasta and beans were observed held at 131-132 in the kitchen. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Tabouleh was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Donuts, scones, cookies, muffins, sandwiches, wraps, and yogurt & granola parfaits, packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. All products were removed from self-service areas. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The ceiling and pvc pipes in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Potatoes was observed held at 102-119 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Potatoes were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the Takeaway hot hold unit have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Paper & adhesive observed on numerous food containers. The ice cream chest has an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The fan covers and walls in the main walk in cooler, and the ceilings in both walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

Sliced tomatoes, ham, and chicken salad were observed held at 44-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were disposed of as usual procedure at the end of lunch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The grip on the slicer was not in good repair. A new grip has been ordered per PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Ham, turkey, tuna salad, and egg salad observed held at 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were transferred from the salad bar to freezer to rapidly chill. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered plastic container. Pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered plastic container greater than four inches deep. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Green onions were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the grilled cheese area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The grip on the slicer was not in good repair, with a part of it broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the table beneath the grill, and the table edge next to the fryer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Numerous food containers have an accumulation of old stickers paper & adhesive. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The floors especially beneath the kitchen equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The wall behind the grill has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
Hood panels have an accumulation of grease and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot into plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the Community refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024

Cookies, sweet breads, and sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2024

The tubing on the milk in the dispenser was not cut with at least one inch protruding, or cut on an angle. The bulk milk container dispensing tube shall be cut on the diagonal leaving no more than one inch protruding from the chilled dispensing head. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
The hand washing sink in the kitchen is in poor repair, with water leaking from the hot water handle. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2024
The walk in fan covers have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2024
One light bulb in the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2024

The corner edge piece along the wall by the steam table area is in poor repair, detached from the wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2024

Cut melon, chicken, and tofu observed held at 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit on the salad bars. Potato salad observed held at 51 degrees F on the service line. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were placed in the walk in cooler on sheet pans to rapidly chill. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

Salads, sandwiches, cookies, and muffins packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

One lowboy refrigeration unit located in the back kitchen area was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. The refrigeration unit must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with soil residue and biofilm. Food contact surfaces of the mixer had an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine and mixer were taken out of service to be clean and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

Milk was observed held at 48-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk at 50 was disposed of. Milk at 48 was transferred to another refrigeration unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

Chicken and melon observed held at 47-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were removed from the salad bar and placed in walk in to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
Pasta was observed with a date mark in excess of 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

Thermometers are lacking in one store room refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

Salads, breakfast sandwiches, cookies, and muffins packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonia sanitizer is 150-400 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023

One lowboy refrigeration unit in the back kitchen area was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. The refrigeration unit must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
The hand sink in the kitchen cooking area is in poor repair, dripping from the hot water handle. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

A dark substance observed on the floor in the back storage area, possibly dripping from the ceiling in front of the refrigerators. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
